reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para recrear. Juegos para chicos. Lugar ideal para hacer un alto en el camino y tomarse unos mates en las mesas del parque.

(Translated by Google)
A great place for recreation. Playground for children. An ideal spot to take a break and enjoy some mate at the park tables.

reviews.comment:
Es servicio es bueno. Muchos camiones pero atienden relativamente rápido. Los baños están cuidados y tiene un bar bastante grande. Está bien.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good. There are a lot of trucks, but they're relatively quick. The restrooms are well-maintained, and it has a fairly large bar. It's fine.
